body:
## Rationale

Inferno (Behemoth) is in our roster. We have:
- ✅ `whats-in-infernos-kit` (kit overview article)
- ❌ NO album-specific article for *The Satanist* (2014)

*The Satanist* is Behemoth's most critically acclaimed album — widely named Album of the Year 2014, Grammy Award for Best Metal Performance nominee, and a landmark that defined 2010s extreme metal. It represents Inferno's peak drumming performance and has permanently elevated Behemoth's search profile.

GSC shows 'behemoth drum kit' at pos 10.5 / 0% CTR / 2 impr — a second ranking URL with album-specific content could push this into page 1 territory.

This follows the same drummer × album pattern as: iowa-drum-setup (Slipknot), reign-in-blood-drum-setup (Slayer), obzen-drum-setup (Meshuggah), altars-of-madness-drum-setup (Morbid Angel).

## Article spec

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Slug | `the-satanist-drum-setup` |
| Drummer | Inferno (Zbigniew Robert Promiński) |
| Band | Behemoth |
| Album | *The Satanist* (2014, Metal Blade) |
| Genre | Blackened Death Metal |
| Target queries | 'behemoth satanist drum kit', 'inferno drum setup', 'behemoth drum kit 2014', 'the satanist recording gear' |

## Gear angle

Inferno recorded *The Satanist* with Tama Starclassic Maple + Pearl Masterworks (snare), Meinl cymbals. Studio setup differed significantly from his usual live electronic hybrid. The album required extreme precision across 9 tracks of technical blackened death metal at 180-220 BPM — rich editorial angle for kit breakdown.

## Content requirements (quality gate)

- ≥350 words
- ≥3 internal links (drummer profile, whats-in-infernos-kit, technique/blast-beat)
- FAQPage JSON-LD (≥3 Q&A)
- MusicAlbum + Person schema (as per #1454 pattern already shipped)
- LLM markdown file: `public/llms/articles/the-satanist-drum-setup.md`

## Files to touch

- `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js` — add entry with full content
- `public/llms/articles/the-satanist-drum-setup.md` — create LLM markdown

## Verify

1. `curl https://metalforge.io/articles/the-satanist-drum-setup | grep -i 'inferno'` → returns content
2. Article appears in `/articles` listing hub
3. JSON-LD validates (MusicAlbum + FAQPage)
4. Internally links to `/drummer/inferno` and `/articles/whats-in-infernos-kit`
5. `/llms/articles/the-satanist-drum-setup.md` exists and is sitemapped

## Done

`the-satanist-drum-setup` entry added to albumArticles.js + LLM file created.
title: SEO: Inferno — Behemoth 'The Satanist' drum setup article (AOTY 2014, distinct from whats-in-infernos-kit)
note: All files already present and committed. albumArticles.js entry at line 29306 with MusicAlbum+Person schema, 4-item FAQ, 3+ internal links, ≥350 words. LLM file at public/llms/articles/the-satanist-drum-setup.md. Listed in llms/index.md. albumArticles.js passes node --check.
